title: Developer - AI/ML
company_focus:
Asset servicing and financial services for alternatives,
corporations and private clients
description:
About Citco

The market leader premier provider. The best in the
business. At Citco, we’ve been the front-runner in our field
since our incorporation in 1948 led to the evolution of the
asset servicing sector itself. This pioneering spirit
continues to guide us today as we innovate and expand, push
beyond the boundaries of our industry, and shape its future.
From working exclusively with hedge funds to serving all
alternatives, corporations and private clients, our
organization has grown immensely across asset classes and
geographies. For us, this progress is a pattern that we’ll
only maintain as we move forward, always prioritizing our
performance. So, for those who want to play at the top of
their game and be at the vanguard of their space, we say:
Welcome to Citco.

For more information about Citco, please visit www.citco.com

About the Team & Business Line:

We are seeking an experienced Developer for Enablement (C4E)
delivery team. This role is responsible for delivering the
technical foundations of Citco's AI capabilities through
reusable patterns, frameworks, and components. The role
requires hands-on technical experience, focusing on building
high-performing applications that enable AI adoption across
Citco. The ideal candidate will bring deep AI engineering
expertise while fostering a culture of innovation and
technical excellence.

Responsibilities

Your Role:

- Build and maintain core AI infrastructure, APIs, and cloud
  integrations
- Implement LLM/GenAI solutions, vector stores, and embedding
  strategies
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enable AI
  adoption
- Ensure code quality through testing, CI/CD, and DevOps
  practices

Qualifications

About You:

- 3–5 years of software development experience
- Strong Python, FastAPI, and REST API skills
- Hands-on experience with LLMs, GenAI, or vector databases
- Cloud experience (AWS, Azure, or GCP)
- Experience with React, CI/CD, and Agile practices
- Strong problem-solving and communication skills

Nice to Have

- AWS Bedrock or Azure OpenAI experience
- Event-driven cloud-native architecture
- AI governance and compliance awareness

Our Benefits

Your well-being is of paramount importance to us, and
central to our success. We provide a range of benefits,
training and education support, and flexible working
arrangements to help you achieve success in your career
while balancing personal needs. Ask us about specific
benefits in your location.

We embrace diversity, prioritizing the hiring of people from
diverse backgrounds. Our inclusive culture is a source of
pride and strength, fostering innovation and mutual respect.

Citco welcomes and encourages applications from people with
disabilities. Accommodation is available upon request for
candidates taking part in all aspects of the selection.
responsibilities: Build and maintain core AI infrastructure, APIs, and cloud integrations
Implement LLM/GenAI solutions, vector stores, and embedding strategies
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to enable AI adoption across Citco
Ensure code quality through testing, CI/CD, and DevOps practices
Develop reusable patterns, frameworks, and components for AI capabilities
use_cases: AI infrastructure and reusable components for internal teams
ai_classification_reasoning:
This role involves directly building AI infrastructure,
implementing LLM/GenAI solutions, and working with vector
stores and embedding strategies. The position requires
hands-on technical work creating AI capabilities and
reusable AI components, not just supporting infrastructure
for others' AI work.
